reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
No tenían nafta infinia. Cargué solo 10 litros de super y derramaron nafta sobre el vehículo. Cuando me tuve que bajar para pagar se tildó la computadora y demoré bastante.

(Translated by Google)
They didn't have any Infinia gas. I only filled up with 10 liters of Super, and they spilled gas on the vehicle. When I had to get out to pay, the computer froze, and it took me a long time.

reviewReply.comment: Susana le pedimos disculpas por la sucedido
